title: His Answer To A Question.
content:
Some would know
    Why I so
    Long still do tarry,
    And ask why
    Here that I
    Live and not marry.
    Thus I those
    Do oppose:
    What man would be here
    Slave to thrall,
    If at all
    He could live free here?
meaning:
"His Answer To A Question." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
